name: cowork
description: Co-work protocol for Claude + Codex: independent drafts, mutual critique, provenance-routed implementation, settlement. Bundles a forked unrestricted Codex runtime (no sandbox, project-aware, Windows-safe spawn). Provides agent cowork:codex-rescue and slash commands /cowork:cowork, /cowork:question, /cowork:review, /cowork:rescue, /cowork:setup, /cowork:code-review, /cowork:status, /cowork:cancel, /cowork:result, /cowork:adversarial-review.

upstream.name: OpenAI
upstream.note: Forked Codex runtime merged into cowork plugin to avoid name collision with upstream codex plugin. Adds Windows-safe spawn (shell:true on win32), no sandbox by default, and project-aware routing.
